name: Fried Beaver Tail
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin beaver tails, clean thoroughly and wash well in a solution of salt water. Let soak overnight in cold water to cover, adding 1/2 cup vinegar and 1 tablespoon salt to the water.
2. The next day, remove from the brine, wash, then cover with a solution of 2 teaspoons soda to 2 quarts water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Drain.
3. Dredge beaver tails in seasoned flour.
4. Melt butter in a heavy fry pan and sauté tails at low heat until tender.
5. Mix wine with mustard, sugar, garlic powder, and Worcestershire sauce.
6. Add to beaver tails and simmer gently for 10 minutes, basting frequently.
